description: Author verifiable eval records through a draft→review→revise→submit loop with enforced graders.
name: io.github.cyanheads/evals-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Root folder for record JSON. The store manages drafts/, submitted/, and exports/ subdirs under it.
environmentVariables.name: EVALS_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: When 'true', evals_submit_draft requests a human confirmation where the client supports elicitation.
environmentVariables.name: EVALS_REQUIRE_CONFIRMATION

environmentVariables.description: Default metadata.license applied when a draft omits one.
environmentVariables.name: EVALS_DEFAULT_LICENSE

environmentVariables.description: Directory of framework-written tool-call captures; when set, captures EvalsIDs resolve to full dumps.
environmentVariables.name: EVALS_CAPTURE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
